sections.paragraph:
Original: צרדתה צרדה

Transliteration: tserêdâh tserêdâthâh

Phonetic: tser-ay-daw'

BDB Definition:

Zereda or Zeredathah = "fortress"
  1. a town or territory in Manasseh and the home of Jeroboam

Origin: apparently from an unused root meaning to pierce

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
